data.name: Identify the fill type and process details

parameters.script: return (eprPatientResponse?.error != null) ? { matchType: 'FAIL' } : (!Array.isArray(eprPatientResponse?.result?.data)) ? { matchType: 'NONE' } : (eprPatientResponse.result.data.length === 1 ? { matchType: 'SINGLE', pharmacyId: eprPatientResponse.result.data[0]?.pharmacy_id ?? 0 } : (eprPatientResponse.result.data.length > 1 ? { matchType: 'MULTIPLE' } : { matchType: 'NONE' }));

return calculatedQueueDate?.case_order_details?.queue_date == null ? false : (console.log('isPast:', ((d1=new Date(calculatedQueueDate.case_order_details.queue_date), d2=new Date(), d1.setSeconds(0,0), d2.setSeconds(0,0), d1<=d2)), 'queue_date:', d1, 'currentTime:', d2) || (d1 <= d2));

const ids = (eprPatientSelectResponse.result.cardholderIDs || []); const caseCardholderId = caseOrderDetailsObj.case_order_details && caseOrderDetailsObj.case_order_details.cardholder_id; const isMatch = caseCardholderId != null && ids.map(String).includes(String(caseCardholderId)); return { isMatch: isMatch, cardholderExists:ids.length > 0 };

parameters.script: return ({documentIds: (orderPrescriptions.c_order_prescription_details_case || []).filter(d => d.prescription_attachment?.id != null).map(d => d.prescription_attachment?.id), caseId: caseId, templateDocumentId: 2008, programId: 70, alias: 'PAP_' + orderPrescriptions.products?.trademarked_name + '_' + orderPrescriptions.products?.product_uuid + '_' + orderPrescriptions.case_key})

console.log('retryResult - ' + typeof retryResult + ' - ' + JSON.stringify(retryResult)); return typeof retryResult === 'string' ? false : (typeof retryResult === 'object' && retryResult.status === 'success' ? true : false)

if (cdsAttemptResult === -1 || typeof cdsAttemptResult !== 'object') { return 'PROCEED'; } const count = Number(cdsAttemptResult?.attempt_count ?? 0); if (count <= 3) { return 'WAIT'; } return 'STOP';

console.log('retryResult2 - ' + typeof retryResult2 + ' - ' + JSON.stringify(retryResult2)); return typeof retryResult2 === 'string' ? false : (typeof retryResult2 === 'object' && retryResult2.status === 'success' ? true : false)
return (inflightLogs.case_inflight_logs || []).reduce((p, c) => (p?.id > c?.id ? p : c), null)?.fulfillment_status?.toLowerCase() || null;
